reference_images.label: reflect_academy_moodboard
reference_images.purpose: Academy hall color rhythm, duel staging, card layout balance, and warm-versus-cool lighting anchor.

reference_images.label: reflect_academy_player
reference_images.purpose: Player silhouette, costume layering, hand pose, and magical focus posture anchor.

bevy_constraints.bundle_strategy: Use SpriteBundle with alpha blending for the lane overlay and keep it on a dedicated effects layer.
bevy_constraints.asset_loading: Load world/world_spell_lane_overlay_960x220.png through AssetServer after the arena background is ready and attach it to the lane entity.
runtime_notes: Lane overlay remains screen stable because the duel camera does not pan.
The reflect line coordinates feed gameplay timing markers without reading texture pixels at runtime.
Transparent edges must preserve the hall painting below the lane.

context.usage: Translucent combat lane that frames forecast travel, reflect line placement, and return path readability.

shape.silhouette: Horizontal lane band with a thin reflect line, soft edge fade, and a brighter center guide.

specs.lighting: Center line carries cyan glow and side bands fade into transparent navy.

acceptance_criteria: Reflect line sits 180 px from the left edge and stays visible on both dark and warm background regions.
Outer alpha fade reaches full transparency before the frame edge to prevent harsh lane cutoffs.
